title: Classic Comforting Russian Dough Dumplings
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring strong white flour dough wrapped around a savory filling, boiled to perfection and served with a side of sour cream or butter.
instructions: Combine the flour, egg, water, and salt in a large mixing bowl and knead until a smooth dough forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls, about the size of a small egg.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of ground beef and onion in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook the dumplings for 10-15 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of sour cream or butter.
